item.description:
# iData v0.1.11
This release reduces terminal flicker during table rendering while preserving stable layout behavior across window focus changes, file switches, and tutorial flows.
## Highlights
- Remove hot-path xterm forced-refresh calls that caused visible flashing under sustained output - Keep forced resize on focus/visibility/pageshow events so the table viewport re-aligns when app/window state changes - Deduplicate resize signaling to avoid redundant host resize messages when dimensions have not changed - Expand regression coverage for large-table open/switch stress and full tutorial chapter traversal/interrupt scenarios
## Notes
- Primary install path: - `brew install --cask laleoarrow/tap/idata` - Recommended VisiData install path: - `pipx install visidata` - `pipx inject visidata openpyxl pyxlsb xlrd zstandard`
